chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Appeal No.289 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of M.A. No.5243/2024 ------------------------------------- 16.05.2025 Mr. Tahir Hussain Mangi, A.P.G. ------------------------------------ Appellants Ubaidullah Khan and Osama were tried by learned Additional Sessions Judge-VI, Karachi East, in Sessions Case No.1373/2023, arising out of FIR No.200 of 2023, registered at P.S. Awami Colony, Karachi for offence under Sections 397, 34, PPC. After full dressed trial, appellants were convicted under section 392, PPC and sentenced to 3 years R.I. and to pay fine Rs.5000/- each, in failure whereof to undergo R.I. for 3 months more. Benefit of section 382-B, Cr.PC was extended to appellants. Hence the instant appeal. Today, jail roll was called from Superintendent, District Prison and Correctional Facility Malir, Karachi, which reveals that the appellants have served out their sentence, including sentence in lieu of fine and have been released from jail on 20.04.2024. Thereafter, appellants have never approached this Court to contest their appeal on merits, which shows that they are not interested to contest their appeal. Therefore, instant criminal appeal is dismissed as having become infructuous. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
